data.raw: Add an accessible status banner to the dashboard header.

ui_apply.summary: Status banner rendered under the dashboard header

rendered.resources/views/dashboard/header.blade.p: System status — All services operating normally. Dismiss.

ui_design.layout: horizontal banner under top nav, full-width

states.empty: Banner hidden when no status to surface
states.loading: Banner shows neutral spinner while message resolves
states.error: Banner switches to danger variant on failures
states.success: Banner switches to success variant on positive ack
states.disabled: Banner muted while another modal owns focus

a11y.focus: dismiss button reachable as last item in tab order

changes.summary: Status banner rendered under the dashboard header

questions: > Stack: `plain`. Reviewing rendered components against the locked design brief.
> The review pass compares `state.ticket.ui_apply.rendered` against `state.ui_design` (microcopy, states, a11y, layout) and produces a structured `findings` list.
> 1. Continue — run the review and write `{findings: [...], review_clean: bool}` into `state.ui_review`
